info.title: AutoVersion
info.description: AutoVersion is a .NET CLI tool that is used for automating versioning and changelogs of Centtr projects.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: An automatic versioning tool for Centtr projects

commands.name: version
commands.description: Perform automated versioning of the specified project(s).

commands.name: changelog
commands.description: Create a changelog for the versioned repository.

commands.name: change
commands.description: Create a change file that contains information regarding the current changes.
